case_title: GUI YING LIANG VS. IRMA JEANETTE GUZMAN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, GUI YING AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, IRMA JEANETTE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2008 - CONTINUED TO JUL-17-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT REFERS THE PLAINTIFF TO THE ACCESS CENTER FOR ASSISTANCE WITH OBTAINING A CANTONESE INTERPRETER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIANG, GUI YING AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, IRMA JEANETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, GUI YING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-06-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, IRMA JEANETTE
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT GUZMAN, IRMA JEANETTE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2008 - JUDGMENT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT (FOR COURT USE ONLY): FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT ENTERED AS TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR: GUZMAN, IRMA JEANETTE (30 DAYS PASSED).
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $438.00 RE 22189 FOR TRANSACTION W0508B05D010 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO GUI YING LIANG, DOC #1902244929, WARRANT #38003296, DATED AUG-24-2009

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. KARINA ZHANG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, GUI YING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUZMAN, IRMA JEANETTE $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $438.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR TRUST RECEIPT NO. 22189 BY DEFENDANT GUZMAN, IRMA JEANETTE
